WIC Mobile App | Madera County
Download the WIC App
Once you receive your WIC card, download the CA WIC app for iPhone or Android phones.
WIC App Set-Up Guide for iPhone and Android
Download our helpful guidance sheets to install the WIC App on Android phones and iPhones.
